summary: iter202a+202c testing complete. Backend 100% passed (24/24 tests). Frontend panels verified: Global Calendar (unified feed, dept filters, day drill-down), Group Resume Builder (New, Import from Events, Edit mode), Echo Events (BEO/Contracts tab with 18 rows). BEO Gantt shows 0 events due to field name mismatch (start vs start_time) - fix applied. Mobile regression passed.

ui_bugs.issue: BEO Gantt event selector shows 0 events. Root cause: CalendarEvent type expects 'start_time'/'end_time' but API returns 'start'/'end'. Fix applied to support both field names.

action_items: Verify BEO Gantt fix is working after HMR reload - the fix supports both 'start'/'end' and 'start_time'/'end_time' field names
critical_code_review_comments: BeoOpsGanttPanel.tsx: CalendarEvent type was missing 'start' and 'end' fields that the API actually returns. Fixed by adding optional 'start'/'end' fields and updating the parsing logic to use either field name.
Global Calendar (UnifiedCalendarPanel): Working correctly with 22 entries, dept filter checkboxes, day drill-down
Group Resume Builder: Working correctly with New, Import from Events (19 importable events), Edit mode tabs
BEO/Contracts tab: Working correctly with 18 event rows and filter buttons

success_rate.frontend: 95% - BEO Gantt fix applied, all other features working

seed_data_creation: TEST_iter202_Create, TEST_iter202_Update, TEST_Applied_Suggestion resumes created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter202 features tested: Global Calendar Unification (feed, day drill-down, dept filters), Group Resume Builder (New, Import, Edit mode, AI apply/discard), BEO/Contracts tab. BEO Gantt had field name mismatch issue (start vs start_time) - fix applied. Mobile regression passed. Backend APIs all working correctly.
